plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: PoolCare uses your location to verify your arrival at pool service sites. For example, when you start a scheduled pool maintenance visit, your location is checked to confirm you are at the correct address.

plugins.cameraPermission: PoolCare uses your camera to document pool conditions during service visits. For example, you can photograph water clarity, chemical readings, or equipment issues to include in the visit report.

plugins.photosPermission: PoolCare accesses your photo library so you can upload a profile photo or attach existing pool photos to service reports. For example, you can select a saved photo of pool equipment to include in a maintenance visit.
plugins.cameraPermission: PoolCare uses your camera so you can take a profile photo or capture pool conditions. For example, you can photograph a pool's filter system during onboarding to document its setup.
